title: Sand Tray Letters
description: Choose sand, salt, or flour, then form uppercase letters by revealing a bright blue layer beneath the tactile tray.
learningGoals: Practice uppercase letter formation with ordered multi-stroke guidance
Connect completed letter shapes with spoken letter sounds
Build controlled one-finger movement through tactile tracing
interactionModel: Choose a sensory material, trace ordered strokes with one finger, then shake or tap to smooth the tray.
feedbackModel: Tracing reveals a turquoise underlayer with material-specific sound; success adds confetti, a spoken letter sound, and shake-to-reset guidance.

modes.title: Sand Tray Letters
modes.skill: uppercase formation, stroke order, and letter-sound link

credits: Kaigani; material card artwork generated with the built-in GPT Image 2 workflow (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
